title: Dr Evil - VC Pitch Bait and Switch

blocks.text: Basically, you book a ton of pitch meetings for whatever is the hotness du jour, but a few minutes into the pitch, start a subtle costume change, and shift into a speech about how the real goal is to ransom the moon. Plenty of fuel to rib the VC's on the call, "Y'all have funded much more evil stuff no?"
I want to run this skit if I ever get fully out of the Founder/VC rat race.
